chinese_news.title: Walulu：用六个月撕开一条新赛道
chinese_news.summary:
文丨果脯

近日，成都雨之灵动科技有限公司（后称雨之灵动）宣布完成总额数千万人民币的天使轮及Pre-A轮融资。

目前其投资方阵容已颇为亮眼，包含KK集团、4399、科大讯飞和一家知名财务投资机构，涵盖了财务资本、渠道资源、游戏行业及AI技术四大维度。做到这种程度，基本已经覆盖了一家AI消费品公司的所需的核心拼图。

雨之灵动能同时吸引到这四类资方，一定程度上说明他们的项目不仅打动了财务投资人的直觉，也获得了产品方对其产品的市场期望。

雨之灵动的核心产品是AI仿生毛绒宠物Walulu。在公司创始人兼CEO顾小毛的愿景中，他们希望将Walulu打造成“AI时代的宝可梦”。

这并非雨之灵动最早的想法。2023年，他们决定ALL in AI时，首选的方向是自研垂类大模型。团队第一时间自购GPU并组建算法团队，持续交付了多个百万级的政府与B端项目。

同期，他们也开始探索2C路径，依托AI视频生成能力产出过多个爆款内容，单视频最高曾获得千万级曝光。后续他们还计划构建一站式IP生成平台，签约

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发｜新加坡博士团队创业获种子轮融资，首款产品做“会飞的家庭管家”
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 乔钰杰

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，深圳熵约智能科技有限公司（下称“熵约科技”）日前完成数百万美元种子轮融资，本轮融资由初心资本独家投资。

熵约科技由新加坡南洋理工大学博士曾武，马来西亚理科大学博士况伟杰，清华智能产业研究院研究员万浩诚共同创立，核心团队成员来自清华大学、华中科技大学，南京航空航天大学，字节跳动，比亚迪等高校和企业，背景覆盖人工智能、理论物理与微型无人机系统。

目前，熵约科技的首款产品针对家庭空间设计，为全球首款家庭飞行机器人Flyer O1。

chinese_news.title: 量子计算走出“科幻片”，「波色量子」在肿瘤、脑机等领域交出百余个落地案例
chinese_news.summary:
文｜胡香赟

编辑｜海若镜

在科幻电影《流浪地球2》中，拥有指数级运算能力的智能量子计算机“MOSS”，不仅能统筹起全世界的计算资源，支撑1万台“行星发动机”同步运转，还承载足“数字生命计划”那海量的、近乎无底洞般的计算需求，引发大众对量子计算机的无限遐想。这种曾经令人惊叹的科幻设定，如今已慢慢从实验室走向商业化落地。

按照“十五五规划纲要”，量子科技已被列入六大未来产业之一；市场层面的热度同样高涨：据IT桔子数据，到今年4月，国内量子计算赛道中的企业已超过90家，TOP 10企业的总估值逼近500亿元。其中，那些拥有海外顶尖学术背景和成熟产业经历的市场化团队，在这一轮资本竞逐中更受青睐，估值水平也相对高于同类企业。

成立于2020年的波色量子就是其中之一。波色量子并未依附于某家科研院所，但已拿到11轮融资，累计金额达18.4亿元。今年3月完成的10亿元B轮融资，直接创下国内量子计算领域单轮融资纪录。团队构成方面，创始人、CEO文凯博士毕业于斯坦福大学，师从量子计算领域权威学者山本喜久；COO马寅曾在航天行业工

chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报 ｜千问与淘宝打通，正式上线AI购物；泡泡玛特将在5月13日举行2026年一季度业务更新电话会
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

百济神州：第一季度净利润为16.08亿元，同比扭亏为盈

36氪获悉，百济神州发布2026年一季度业绩报告。报告显示，2026年第一季度实现营业收入105.44亿元，同比增长31.0%；归属于上市公司股东的净利润为16.08亿元，上年同期亏损，同比扭亏为盈。业绩变动主要系产品收入增长和费用管理推动了经营效率的提升。

营收确认规则是否存在调整可能？贵州茅台回应

5月11日，贵州茅台召开2025年度及2026年第一季度业绩说明会。会上，针对公司营业收入确认规则以及后续是否存在调整的可能的提问，贵州茅台财务总监、代董事会秘书余思明回应表示，公司严格按照财政部《企业会计准则第14号——收入》要求，在客户取得相关商品控制权时确认收入。其中，自营渠道（含i茅台）以客户确认收货为准，社会经销渠道以经销商签收货物为准。（每经网）

chinese_news.title: 理想整车研发负责人刘立国：说理想不重视技术，是大大的误解
chinese_news.summary:
理想汽车整车电动研发高级副总裁 刘立国

文｜肖漫

编辑｜李勤

走过10年造车历程后，新势力阵营已经普遍从“轻盈”走向“厚重”。尤其是理想汽车，这家公司高呼成为“ 具身智能企业”，但也同时在垒高每一块整车技术能力。

尤其是过去4年，理想汽车几乎重构了底盘系统，联合供应商深度共创了底盘三大项：EMB刹车+800V主动悬架+线控转向。

理想在电池上也在进行自制布局，同时，在自身起家的增程技术上，理想也走到了自研自制阶段

chinese_news.title: 硬氪专访 | 拿到行业最大单笔融资后，余轶南说万里长征才走了第一步
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 邱晓芬

编辑 | 袁斯来

余轶南似乎是那种总能提前踩中风口的冒险家。

他总在追逐更新、更刺激，早期甚至带着些浪漫想象。博士毕业后，他没有如很多同侪一般，进入学术圈，过上平稳安定的一生，而是冲入互联网浪潮，2015年，他又因为余凯一句“我们一起去做 AI 芯片吧？” ，便追随余凯加入地平线创始团队，成为001号员工。此后几年，地平线逐渐成长为国际上自动驾驶领域最受关注的科技公司之一，并于2024年在港交所上市，成为当年港股最大的IPO。

2024年底，他离开地平线，创立「维他动力」，希望把过去十年在自动驾驶领域积累的能力，迁移到消费级机器人上。

TOP3大新闻

员工人均奖金达610万人民币？SK海力士回应

近日有消息称，SK海力士韩国员工人均奖金将达610万人民币。该消息源于国际投行麦格理证券的预测。该投行认为，若SK海力士2027 年营业利润达到447万亿韩元，按营业利润的10%和去年年末约3.5万名员工总数简单计算，分红总规模将达到约44.7万亿韩元，人均可发放奖金约12.9亿韩元，接近610万人民币。5月9日，SK海力士向第一财经记者回应称，由于今年与明年的年度业绩尚未确定，奖金规模也无法预测。该公司同时表示，已在总部层面建立了一套新制度，即以营业利润的10%作为资金来源，每年发放一次绩效奖金。（第一

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Solana (SOL) trade above $250 on July 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinGecko daily closing price or Binance SOLUSDT spot price
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: SOL trending on crypto boards; AI-narrative tailwind; but market assumes tech selloff if equities correct—mispriced upside if macro stays loose.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: SOL in trending crypto list; hantavirus/geopolitical risk-off hasn't yet spooked crypto; Trump summit could unlock AI-China trade narrative supporting SOL rallies.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will NVIDIA (NVDA) close Q2 2026 (by June 30) with YTD return exceeding +25%?

market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Trump-Xi summit + CEO delegation = AI/semiconductor geopolitical unlock; Hacker News AI debate shows demand for compute; but earnings miss risk (see MARA -$1.3B loss) overlooked.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will U.S. 10-year Treasury yield close above 4.5% by September 30, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Federal Reserve H.15 daily rates or Bloomberg UST 10Y YTM
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Oil supermajors beating on trading desk strength (inflation signal); but bond market pricing in Powell dovishness—China trade deal could weaken dollar, lift yields.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Big Oil earnings beat signals commodity/inflation resilience; Trump-Xi trade friction could devalue USD and push real rates higher; UK re-engaging EU suggests reflation.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Circle (USDC issuer) announce a new blockchain token or mainnet by August 31, 2026?

market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Chinese AI infrastructure play underpriced vs. OpenAI/Anthropic hype; Qwen integration shows consumer AI revenue path; Trump-Xi summit may unlock China tech strategic investment thesis.

investment_theses.thesis: Long DXY (USD index) through Aug 2026 on geopolitical risk-off from U.S.-Iran tensions and Trump-Xi summit friction; equity volatility should bid safe-haven dollar.
supporting_signals: BBC: 'Trump says Iran ceasefire is on massive life support'—escalation risk rising.
CNBC: 'hopes for U.S.-Iran peace deal fade'; European stocks opened sharply lower.
Trump bringing Musk/Cook to China on contentious trade/AI agenda suggests deal risk, not harmony.
investment_theses.counter_view: Trump summit could surprise with deal (de-risking), and Fed dovishness (Powell pivot) would weigh on dollar; China stimulus talks also possible.
investment_theses.expression: Long DXY via iShares Currency Hedged MSCI EAFE (HEFA inverse proxy); or direct DXY futures (ICE DX contract); or short EUR/USD if preference for FX pairs.

investment_theses.thesis: Long BTC perps (leverage 2-3x) targeting $85k+ by end-May; funding rates positive, floor at $80k, safe-haven bid into geopolitical stress, and institutional (Bitmine ETH buying) narrative spillover.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Bitcoin briefly hits $82,000, SOL, DOGE higher as Michael Burry warns of stock crash'—safe-haven macro pivot.
Cointelegraph: 'Bitcoin funding rates turn positive: Is BTC rally to $85K next?' + 'Bitcoin's floor looks firmer at $80,000'.
Trump-Xi summit geopolitical premium + Iran war risk = macro bid for non-correlated assets.
investment_theses.counter_view: If Trump-Xi deal announced, geopolitical premium unwinds; or equity relief rally pulls BTC funds into stock recovery; funding rate positive can reverse on leverage liquidations.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC perps on Bybit/Deribit at 2-3x leverage targeting $85k; or spot + funding rate carry trade (buy spot, short perps at contango).

investment_theses.thesis: Underweight European equities (STOXX 600) vs. NASDAQ through June 2026; U.S.-Iran tensions support Mag 7 (AI/tech as safe haven), while EU trade/defense spending uncertainty and Starmer-EU Brexit anxiety undermine cyclicals.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'European stocks open sharply lower as hopes for U.S.-Iran peace deal fade'; defensive bid into U.S. tech.
BBC: 'Britain at the heart of Europe'—Starmer cabinet instability and EU rejoin chatter = political risk premium on FTSE.
Trump-Xi summit on trade friction suggests cyclical Europe underperforms AI-heavy Nasdaq.
investment_theses.counter_view: Big Oil earnings beat (trading desk strength, commodities bid) could inflate European energy stocks; or EU defense spending announcement (geopolitical spending cycle) supports industrials.
investment_theses.expression: Short STOXX 600 (via SCHX or EUNX); or long ratio spread QQQ/EWU (NASDAQ over UK); or sell ASML/SAP on valuation vulnerability.

investment_theses.thesis: Long USDC yield (Aave/Compound lending rates or 3-6mo Treasury-backed stablecoins) into late 2026; Aave Arbitrum $71M ETH vote and Circle's $3B blockchain bet signal stablecoin infrastructure arms race and dapp liquidity crunch—yield will normalize higher.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Aave launches binding Arbitrum vote to move $71 million in disputed ETH'—governance capital redeployment in stablecoin protocols.
CoinDesk: 'Circle is betting on new $3 billion blockchain'—Circle expanding rail, implying higher stablecoin fees/spreads.
Bitmine/Ethereum Foundation activity = DeFi infrastructure overhaul underway.
investment_theses.counter_view: Stablecoin yields compress if Fed cuts rates sharply (Powell dovish signal); or if Tether/USDC issuance accelerates, liquidity floods and rates collapse.
investment_theses.expression: Long USDC lending on Aave/Compound (variable rate pools on Arbitrum/Ethereum); or synthetic via 3-6mo Treasury stablecoin yield pools (e.g., sUSDe on Ethena if available); or Aave token (AAVE) long position betting governance expansion.

investment_theses.thesis: Long ETH/BTC ratio through Q3 2026; Bitmine targeting 5% ETH supply (institutional accumulation narrative), Ethereum Foundation protocol leadership solidifying, and Circle/Aave DeFi reboot imply Ethereum smart-contract demand surge vs. BTC's inflation-hedge commodity role.
supporting_signals: Cointelegraph: 'Bitmine slows Ethereum buys, targets December to own 5% of supply'—largest non-exchange ETH holder = structural bid.
Cointelegraph: 'Ethereum Foundation hits Glamsterdam milestones, names new protocol leads'—dev momentum credibility.
DeFi governance (Aave, Circle, Uniswap) heating up = ETH dapp economic value extraction narrative.
investment_theses.counter_view: Bitcoin safe-haven flows (geopolitical risk) keep BTC outperforming; or Ethereum scaling issues (blob spam, sequencer centralization) resurface, undermining smart-contract value prop.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH/BTC ratio via perps on Bybit/Deribit (buy ETH, short BTC equivalent notional); or delta-neutral long ETH call spread vs. short BTC puts; or spot ETH hold if risk-on macro.
